title: Delicate Fluffy Croatian Cheese Pasta
description: A quick and easy Croatian dish featuring creme fraiche and miso marinate, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This kosher friendly recipe is made with fluffy pasta and a blend of creamy cheese and spices.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fettuccine pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and creme fraiche until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked fettuccine pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the oil and spice mixture.
Add the miso and creme fraiche mixture to the skillet and toss to combine with the pasta.
Stir in the shredded grana padano cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with chopped parsley and lemon zest.
